posts.title: About Me
posts.text: ✉   chen@nlab.ci.i.u-tokyo.ac.jp PhD student at the University of Tokyo, under the supervision of Hideki Nakayama. My currently research topic is Story Generation and Scientific Paper Generation. Education2019 - nowPhD, Computer Science; University of Tokyo (Japan)2017 - 2019MSc, Computer Science; University of Tokyo (Japan)2012 - 2016BSc, Software Engineering; Shandong University (China) Experience2019.8 - nowResearch AssistantNational Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology, Japan 2021.2 - nowCooperation withCyberagent, Japan 2019.10 - 2021.1Cooperation withToyota, Japan 2018.11 - 2019.4:Research Assistant (Excellent intern student)Huawei Technologies, Japan PublicationGraphPlan: Story Generation by Planning with Event GraphH Chen , R Shu, H Takamura, H Nakayamaarxiv Commonsense Knowledge Aware Concept Selection For Diverse and Informative Visual StorytellingH Chen , Y Huang, H Takamura, H NakayamaAAAI2021 Object Recognition With Continual Open Set Domain Adaptation for Home RobotI Kishida, H Chen , M Baba, J Jin, A Amma, H NakayamaWACV2021 Semantic aware attention based deep object co-segmentationH Chen , Y Huang, H NakayamaACCV2018 Language Skill Chinese (Native speaker) English (Listening: Good, Reading: Good, Speaking: Modest, Writing: Modest) Japanese (Listening: Good, Reading: Good, Speaking: Modest, Writing: Limited)
